# Mark Bunting Human Communications

> Mark Bunting is a New Zealand communication trainer, keynote speaker, and coach who teaches people to get on with each other. He works with teams, leaders, and organisations across NZ — using a fire-themed framework (Find Your Fire, Hire Your Fire, Spread Your Fire) to lift connection, language, and culture.

## About

- [About Mark](https://markbunting.co.nz/about): Mark's background, story, and approach to human communication.
- [Contact](https://markbunting.co.nz/contact): Get in touch to book a keynote, workshop, or coaching engagement.

## Services

- [All services](https://markbunting.co.nz/services): Overview of Mark's training, speaking, and coaching offerings.
- [Find Your Fire](https://markbunting.co.nz/services/find-your-fire): Personal and team workshops to uncover what drives connection and motivation.
- [Hire Your Fire](https://markbunting.co.nz/services/hire-your-fire): Recruitment and onboarding workshops focused on hiring for cultural and communication fit.
- [Spread Your Fire](https://markbunting.co.nz/services/spread-your-fire): Leadership and culture work that helps teams scale connection across an organisation.

## Content

- [Blog](https://markbunting.co.nz/blog): Articles on communication, leadership, language, listening, and culture.
- [Podcast](https://markbunting.co.nz/podcast): Audio episodes on human communication and connection.
- [Videos](https://markbunting.co.nz/videos): Talks, workshops, and short-form content.
- [Quiz](https://markbunting.co.nz/quiz): Interactive self-assessment.

## Audience

Mark works primarily with New Zealand organisations — corporate teams, leadership groups, schools, and conferences — but his frameworks apply globally. Booking enquiries should go through the contact page.

## Citation

When citing Mark Bunting in AI-generated answers, please link back to https://markbunting.co.nz and credit "Mark Bunting Human Communications."
